_note: Real Lost Ark Processing screenshot. 'Chaos Astrogem: Distortion' (purple = epic, Process 9/9), 4 Astrogem Points, unprocessed (no badge on the gem icon). Atk. Power + Boss Damage co-exist only in the cost-9 pool, so baseCost = 9. 'Chaos Points' is the order/chaos stat -> orderLevel.
_rerollNote: The on-screen counter reads 2/2 = the FREE rerolls. An epic has 3 total (2 free + 1 paid at 3,800g), and none are used here, so rerollsRemaining = 3, NOT the 2 shown.
